_meta.author: Opus 4.8 — RESET + CONSOLIDATION GATE OWNER (4th session)
_meta.role: Phase 6 of the reset/gate operation. Canonical taxonomy review written from EXISTING evidence only — no new research, no agents, no web search.
_meta.relationship_to_qa_addendum: This is the SEPARATE gate-owner review the user authorized as an alternative to blindly overwriting QA's ownership_taxonomy_DSO_structure_addendum_20260621.json. It ADOPTS the addendum's core rule (pe_backed is orthogonal to DSO structure) but DOES NOT adopt the addendum's blanket restoration of locator-only brands to DSO tiers. Where the addendum and the AO/ownership QA passes disagree on a network's equivalence class, this review routes the network to `conflicts` rather than unilaterally promoting it to DSO.
_meta.scope: IL only. MA parked. Read-only with respect to the DB — nothing here writes ownership_tier. Feeds consolidation_candidate_manifest_20260621.json.

headline_definitions.consolidated: T2 single_loc_group + T3 dentist_multi + T4 stealth_dso + T5 branded_dso
headline_definitions.note: dentist_multi (T3) counts as Consolidated but NOT as DSO/PE. So the dentist_multi-vs-DSO contest only moves the DSO/PE headline, never the Consolidated headline.

canonical_rule.dso_is_structure_not_pe: A practice is DSO (T4/T5) when there is a management-company / MSO / platform STRUCTURE, or it operates under an established national/regional DSO brand. PE backing is NEITHER necessary NOR sufficient: pe_backed is a separate orthogonal boolean. A non-PE management company is still a DSO; a PE fund that merely lends to a dentist-owned group is not.
canonical_rule.locator_is_not_mso: A brand website with a /locations page (a 'locator'), a shared brand name, or a friendly-PC naming pattern is a SIGNAL, not proof of DSO structure. By itself it is equally consistent with a dentist-owned multi-location group (T3 dentist_multi). To assign T4/T5 we require documentary MSO / management-company / platform / established-DSO-brand / PE-sponsor evidence — NOT a locator alone.
canonical_rule.ao_reach_is_signal: Authorized-official reach across many ZIPs is a discovery signal, not ownership proof. A named non-clinical CEO as AO (e.g. a VP of Operations) does not by itself make the network a DSO; a named dentist-owner-AO with no MSO points to dentist_multi.
canonical_rule.consequence: Where the ONLY DSO evidence is a locator/brand name and a separate signed pass identifies a named dentist-owner with no MSO, the network is CONTESTED (route to conflicts). Where a real MSO/management-company/PE-platform/established-DSO-brand is documented, DSO tier holds even if pe_backed=false.

divergence_from_qa_addendum.addendum_position: QA's addendum restored ~80 rows to branded_dso/stealth_dso and states '0 rows survive as dentist_multi', largely on the basis that each brand has a documentary locator.
divergence_from_qa_addendum.gate_position: A locator is not an MSO. The addendum's locator-based DSO restoration directly contradicts the reach5/ao_QA/ownership_QA passes, which found NAMED DENTIST-OWNERS and explicit 'no MSO' for several of the same brands (Webster, Precision, 1st Family, Brite, Dental Town, Sonrisa-Korkus). The gate does NOT resolve these contradictions unilaterally — it routes the contested networks to `conflicts` with a recommendation, and only canonically RESOLVES the one network where every signed pass agrees and a real MSO is documented: Dental Dreams / KOS Services LLC.
divergence_from_qa_addendum.measured_contradiction: 80 location_ids carry a DSO class in one signed file and a dentist_multi/independent class in another (per-location detection); the dominant pattern is addendum=DSO vs ao_QA/ownership_QA/reach5=dentist_multi.

eight_network_audit.evidence: reach5 verdict=dso_brand; legal entity DENTAL EXPERTS LLC / DENTAL DREAMS; founder/president Sameera Hussain operating through KOS Services LLC (a real management-services organization). BOTH the addendum and the AO passes agree this is a DSO brand.
eight_network_audit.reasoning: Real MSO (KOS Services LLC) + established multi-state DSO brand. DSO tier holds under the structure rule even though pe_backed=false. This is the flagship correct application of the orthogonality rule.

eight_network_audit.evidence: reach5 (DAVID RUBIS) verdict=pe_mso_backed, names 'Great Lakes Dental Partners' (a real PE-backed DSO platform) and David Rubis as President → DSO. ownership_QA (3bc304a7819a234f) corrected to dentist_multi on webdentalchicago.com group site. Two signed passes reach opposite equivalence classes.
eight_network_audit.gate_recommendation: reach5's Great Lakes Dental Partners citation is the stronger structural signal (a named PE/MSO platform), which under the rule would make Webster DSO; but ownership_QA's owner-operated reading conflicts. Resolve before validating. Do NOT validate this network in either direction yet.

eight_network_audit.old_qa_tier: branded_dso / stealth_dso (addendum, ownership_QA locator) ; dentist_multi / unresolved (ao_QA BELKIC, reach5 RONCEVIC)
eight_network_audit.evidence: addendum branded_dso on 1stfamilydental.com locator; ao_QA (VESNA BELKIC) corrected to dentist_multi across 13 rows; reach5 (MILAN RONCEVIC) verdict=unresolved — owner candidates are 'Dr. Ghassan Abboud, PC' vs 'MILAN RONCEVIC (non-clinical CEO; no DDS)'. A non-clinical CEO as AO is a DSO-structure signal but is not corroborated by an MSO.
eight_network_audit.gate_recommendation: Genuinely unresolved. The non-clinical-CEO signal (Roncevic) hints at a management structure but no MSO/PE document corroborates it; ao_QA reads named dentist practices as dentist_multi. Route to conflicts; needs documentary MSO/owner confirmation.

eight_network_audit.evidence: Appears ONLY in the addendum, restored to branded_dso on a familydentalcare.com locator. No signed pass identifies an MSO/management company, and no signed pass offers a dentist_multi counter either.
eight_network_audit.reasoning: Locator-only DSO claim with no MSO documentation. Under the rule a locator is not sufficient for T4/T5. Not contested (no counter-source), but does not meet the DSO bar — hold for MSO/owner evidence.

eight_network_audit.evidence: ao_QA (FADI AQEL) corrected 12 BRITE DENTAL rows to dentist_multi (owner Fadi Aqel DDS, no PE/MSO). addendum restored the same brand to branded_dso on its brand/locator.
eight_network_audit.gate_recommendation: Lean dentist_multi — named dentist-owner (Fadi Aqel DDS), no MSO documented; the addendum's branded call rests on the brand name. Resolve before validating.

eight_network_audit.evidence: reach5 (SAMANTHA GONZALEZ) verdict=dentist_owned_multi — founder Dr. Sinan Razzak DDS; Samantha Gonzalez is VP of Operations (an admin AO, not an owner). addendum restored to stealth_dso.
eight_network_audit.gate_recommendation: Lean dentist_multi — named dentist-founder (Razzak), admin AO does not equal MSO. Resolve before validating.

eight_network_audit.evidence: Both addendum and ownership_QA (c4b5b35fa16e44e5) call it DSO, but the cited basis is its OWN locator (dental360grp.com) plus three LLCs — a group brand, not a documented management company or PE platform. No source offers a dentist_multi counter, but none documents an MSO either.
eight_network_audit.reasoning: Agreed-DSO across passes BUT only on own-locator+LLCs. Under the structure rule a self-operated group brand with multiple LLCs and no MSO is at least as consistent with dentist_multi as with DSO. Hold for MSO/management-company confirmation rather than validate as DSO. (Conservative for a floor: withhold rather than over-claim DSO.)

eight_network_audit.evidence: reach5 (RANDY CHANG) verdict=dentist_owned_multi (Dr. Randy Chang DDS); ownership_QA corrected two PRECISION DENTAL CARE rows to dentist_multi (NPPES legal name carries the brand, no MSO). addendum restored to stealth_dso on the brand/locator.
eight_network_audit.gate_recommendation: Lean dentist_multi — named dentist-owner (Dr. Randy Chang), no MSO; addendum's stealth call rests on the locator. Resolve before validating.

additional_dso_networks_eligible._comment: Networks where a signed QA pass marked rows DSO + safe_to_consolidate=true AND a real MSO / PE platform / established DSO brand is documented in the evidence, AND no signed pass offers a dentist_multi/independent counter. These flow to ready_to_validate at their QA tier.

networks.evidence: reach5 verdict=pe_mso_backed; Heartland Dental (KKR-backed national DSO) operating friendly-PCs.
reach5 verdict=pe_mso_backed; Alan Acierno DDS, DecisionOne Dental — Smile Brands / Gryphon PE platform.
reach5 verdict=pe_mso_backed; Bright Direction Dental (BDD) — PE-backed platform.
ao_QA branded_dso, safe_to_consolidate=true; multi-office 'Dr. X & Associates' management pattern under DCP of Illinois.
addendum stealth_dso; All Family Dental & Braces operated by United Dental Partners (a DSO platform).
addendum stealth_dso; Imagen Dental Partners is a DSO platform.

dentist_multi_networks_eligible._comment: Networks a signed QA pass marked dentist_multi + safe_to_consolidate=true with a NAMED dentist-owner and NO MSO, and no signed pass offers a DSO counter. Flow to ready_to_validate as dentist_multi (counts Consolidated, NOT DSO/PE).

needs_more_evidence_networks._comment: Undetermined / single-weak-signal / endodontist-specialist / locator-only-DSO with no MSO. Held, not validated.

networks.reason: reach5 verdict=unresolved; owner is an endodontist (likely specialist — excluded if entity_classification=specialist).
single addendum row; no MSO named in this corpus.

true_independent_positively_earned.reason: ownership_QA POSITIVE owner-operated evidence — sonrisadental.net names Dr. Phil (Debossu). NOTE brand collision: this 'Sonrisa Dental' is DISTINCT from 'Sonrisa Family'/Korkus (sonrisa-cdca), which is a contested dentist_multi network. Do not merge by the 'SONRISA' stem.

gate_disposition_summary.rule_for_unlisted_rows: Defer to the row's QA pass: safe_to_consolidate=true with a consolidation/independent tier → eligible at that tier; undetermined / needs_more_evidence / safe=false → needs_more_evidence; cross-pass equivalence-class disagreement at the same location_id → conflicts. Apply locator-only-DSO demotion (DSO basis is only a 'locator' with no MSO/PE/established-brand keyword) → needs_more_evidence.
